action.reasoning: The task requires a comprehensive business plan with five distinct, complex sections. Generating all of this in a single execution would likely result in shallow analysis and poor structure. Decomposing the task into parallel subtasks for each major section (Market Analysis, Competitor Analysis, Revenue Model, Go-to-Market, Financial Projections) allows for deeper, more focused research and writing. I will then integrate these components into a final, cohesive business plan document.

subtasks.goal: Conduct a detailed market analysis for a Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask analyzes the size, growth, and trends of the Korean local review market. It provides the foundational context for the business plan by identifying target demographics and market opportunities.

outputs.description: A detailed report on the Korean local review market size, growth trends, and target user demographics.

subtasks.goal: Perform a competitor analysis of existing Korean local-review platforms.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask identifies key competitors like Naver Place, Google Maps, and specialized apps. It analyzes their strengths, weaknesses, and market positioning to identify gaps for the new platform.

outputs.description: A detailed report on key competitors, their features, market share, and strategic weaknesses.

subtasks.goal: Develop a revenue model for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask defines how the platform will make money, exploring options like advertising, premium listings, and data services. It ensures the business has a viable path to profitability.

outputs.description: A detailed description of the platform's revenue streams, pricing strategies, and monetization tactics.

subtasks.goal: Create a go-to-market strategy for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask outlines the launch strategy, user acquisition channels, and marketing tactics specific to the Korean digital landscape. It details how the platform will gain initial traction.

outputs.description: A comprehensive go-to-market strategy including launch phases, marketing channels, and user acquisition plans.

subtasks.goal: Generate financial projections for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask creates a 3-5 year financial forecast, including revenue, expenses, and key metrics. It provides the quantitative basis for the business plan's viability.

outputs.description: A 3-5 year financial forecast including P&L, cash flow, and key performance indicators.

self_role.goal: Integrate all subtask outputs into a single, cohesive business plan document.

outputs.description: The final, complete business plan document incorporating market analysis, competitor analysis, revenue model, go-to-market strategy, and financial projections.
